# backend/core/exceptions.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:42Z

## Purpose
(no module docstring — add one to improve this)

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Classes
- `AppError`: Base application error. All domain errors inherit from this.
- `NotFoundError`: Raised when a requested resource does not exist.
- `ValidationError`: Raised when input data fails validation.
- `DataError`: Raised for data integrity or processing errors.
- `ModelError`: Raised for ML model training, loading, or inference errors.
- `ExternalServiceError`: Raised when an external service (Ollama, MLflow, etc.) is unavailable or fails.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
